name: devloop
description: Cross-CLI plugin marketplace (Codex side). devloop is the primary developer-workflow plugin; example is a placeholder for the multi-plugin intent.

plugins.name: devloop
plugins.description: Dev-loop workflow: git/PR + lint/test + workspace-aware state injection + execution-level hard intercepts for Codex.

plugins.name: example
plugins.description: Placeholder plugin demonstrating that the devloop marketplace hosts multiple plugins (Codex side).
